title: thymus hispanicus var. longiflorus
intro: Thymus hispanicus var. longiflorus, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus hispanicus plant, a low-growing, spreading shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Thymus hispanicus var. longiflorus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Thymus hispanicus var. longiflorus, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
